# Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the relevant issue number (if applicable).

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Operations (e.g., CI/CD, Documentation)

## Checklist (Read before submitting!)
- [ ] My code follows the thematic Cyberpunk guidelines in `THEME_GUIDELINES.md`.
- [ ] **E2E Testing Compliance:** I have verified and tested my code against the standards in `manuals/MASTER_TEST_PLAN.md`.
  - *Specifically*: I have reviewed the **Anti-Flakiness Protocol (React State Synchronization)** section and ensured no implicit `press('Enter')` submissions exist in my E2E tests.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (if applicable).
